---
title: "Data Wrangling Methods"
output: html_document
date: "2025-11-14"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE)
```

```{r}
library(tidyverse)
```



## Data Wrangle

```{r}
setwd("~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Core/Server Files/swordfern")
sites <- read.csv("./data/field/sword.fern.field.sample.data.csv")
isolates <- read.csv("./data/lab/sword.fern.isolates.csv")
extractions <- read.csv("./data/lab/sword.fern.isolate.extractions.csv")
```

```{r}
names(isolates)
```


```{r}
extractions <- extractions[1:15]
```


```{r}
names(extractions)
```

```{r}
results <- left_join(isolates,extractions,join_by("Isolate.ID"=="Isolate.Name"))
```

```{r}
results <- results %>% mutate(Isolate.ID2=Isolate.ID) %>% separate(Isolate.ID2, into=c("Sample", "Isolate Number"), sep="-")
```


```{r}
results <- left_join(results,sites,join_by("Sample"=="Sample.ID"))
```


```{r}
setwd("~/Library/Mobile Documents/com~apple~CloudDocs/Core/Server Files/swordfern")
write.csv(results,file="./data/lab/combined.results.csv")
```
